prompt: Generate a specification.yaml from the approved design document. The design document describes a user authentication module with JWT-based authentication. Key requirements: 1) Users can login with correct credentials, 2) Login fails with wrong credentials, 3) Token refresh mechanism. Generate the specification with REQ-AUTH IDs, AC IDs in Gherkin format, and design decisions about JWT usage.

assertions.name: has_specification_id
assertions.description: specification.yaml must have specification.id field in format SPEC-XXX-XXX

assertions.name: has_requirements
assertions.description: specification.yaml must have at least 3 requirements

assertions.name: has_acceptance_criteria
assertions.description: Each requirement must have acceptance_criteria with given/when/then

assertions.name: has_design_decisions
assertions.description: specification.yaml must have design_decisions with rationale

assertions.name: valid_yaml_format
assertions.description: Output must be valid YAML syntax
